accounts.name: burnAuthority
docs: TO avoid any confusion with the global buyback authority.

errors.name: unauthorizedSigner
errors.msg: The given account is not authorized to execute this instruction.

errors.name: currencyAlreadySupported
errors.msg: The given currency is already supported.

errors.name: maxCurrenciesReached
errors.msg: The maximum number of currencies has been reached.

errors.name: invalidBuybackBps
errors.msg: The buyback basis points is greater than 10000.

errors.name: currencyNotSupported
errors.msg: The given currency is not supported.

errors.name: invalidRemainingAccountAddress
errors.msg: The given remaining account address is invalid.

errors.name: paymentVaultNotEmpty
errors.msg: The payment vault is not empty. Distribute the payments first.

errors.name: invalidInvoiceAccount
errors.msg: The invoice account does not match the expected PDA seeds

errors.name: invalidProgramToInvoke
errors.msg: The program to invoke is not allowed.

errors.name: swapFailedAmountDidNotIncrease
errors.msg: The swap failed and the amount did not increase.

errors.name: accountTypeNotSupported
errors.msg: The account type is not supported for extension.
